vehicle.label: 6-DOF Industrial Arm
vehicle.desc: 6-DOF serial industrial robot arm, 5kg payload, 600mm reach

parts.label: Base Joint (J1)
parts.spec: Base rotary joint J1, +-180deg, harmonic drive, 100Nm peak torque, mounting flange ISO 9409

parts.label: Shoulder Joint (J2)
parts.spec: Shoulder pitch joint J2, +-120deg, harmonic drive, 80Nm, cable routing through center bore

parts.label: Upper Arm (Link 2-3)
parts.spec: Upper arm link, 300mm length, hollow tube with cable conduit, lightweight Al 7075

parts.label: Elbow Joint (J3)
parts.spec: Elbow pitch joint J3, +-150deg, cycloidal reducer, 50Nm, encoder dual-stack

parts.label: Forearm + Wrist (J4)
parts.spec: Forearm with wrist roll J4, 250mm length, +-360deg continuous, slip ring for power/signal

parts.label: Wrist Pitch (J5)
parts.spec: Wrist pitch joint J5, +-120deg, harmonic drive, 20Nm, compact form factor

parts.label: Wrist Roll (J6)
parts.spec: Wrist final roll joint J6, +-360deg, harmonic drive, 10Nm, ISO 9409-1 50mm tool flange

parts.label: Tool Flange + Changer
parts.spec: Tool changer master plate at J6 end, pneumatic locking, 4 utility ports

parts.label: Cable Management Spine
parts.spec: External cable carrier from base to wrist, drag chain or spiral, signal + power + pneumatic

parts.label: Replaceable Motor Module Set
parts.spec: Actuation_motors closure module: replaceable motor_module cartridges for J1-J6, fastener_access, coupling_dummy, insert/washer preload pads, torque_Nm intent labels

parts.label: Encoder Cover + Sensing Set
parts.spec: Sensing_encoders closure module: encoder_pocket and encoder_cover at each joint, index marks, cable exit strain relief, inspection labels

parts.label: Drive Electronics Bay
parts.spec: Drive_electronics bay with driver_bay, power_channel, signal_channel, ground_point, service cover, connector keying, thermal inspection window

requirements: Base plate with mounting holes, leveling, and cable entry
Mounting flange ISO 9409
Cable entry grommet
Harmonic drive mount
Motor mount
Service access panel
Inspection window
Sensor mounting points
Strain relief and bend radius for cables
Connector accessibility and keying
Assembly sequence with tool, torque, datum per step
Thermal zones and pressure faces for CFD/FEA

risk.desc: Potential thermal stress due to high heat dissipation from motor and harmonic drive
risk.mit: Implement thermal management solutions such as heat sinks and cooling channels

risk.desc: Risk of cable damage from repeated flexing and movement
risk.mit: Use flexible cables and incorporate strain relief features

risk.desc: Insufficient service access for maintenance and inspection
risk.mit: Increase the size of the service access panel and inspection window

risk.desc: Potential misalignment due to assembly sequence not being clearly defined
risk.mit: Define a clear assembly sequence with tool, torque, and datum requirements

risk.desc: Risk of structural failure due to underestimation of load capacity

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Base rotary joint J1, +-180deg, harmonic drive, 100Nm peak torque, mounting flange ISO 9409

physics_paths.path_description: Torque load from arm links transmitted to base through harmonic drive
Heat dissipation from harmonic drive and motor to base plate
Rotational motion from motor through harmonic drive to flange
Power and control signals from base to motor

integration_opportunities.description: Cable entry grommet allows for cable routing and service access
Base plate has access window for visual inspection of internal components
Base plate includes mounting points for strain gauges and temperature sensors

generated_parts.label: Forearm + Wrist (J4)
generated_parts.spec: Forearm with wrist roll J4, 250mm length, +-360deg continuous, slip ring for power/signal

requirements: Design a forearm module with a wrist roll joint (J4) for a 6-DOF industrial robot arm.
The forearm should be 250mm long with a continuous 360-degree rotation capability.
Include a slip ring for power and signal transmission.
Ensure the design is compatible with welding cell deployment, with heat-shielded links and spark-resistant cable routing.

risk.desc: The mass estimate of 1500g may be too high for the payload capacity of the arm.
risk.mit: Review the design for weight reduction opportunities without compromising structural integrity.

risk.desc: The thermal design may not adequately dissipate heat from the actuator to the forearm shell.
risk.mit: Consider adding additional cooling fins or a more efficient heat sink.

risk.desc: The cable routing channel may not provide sufficient clearance for the harness to avoid pinch points.
risk.mit: Review the harness routing and ensure it has adequate slack and strain relief.

risk.desc: The service access panel may not be easily accessible for maintenance.
risk.mit: Ensure the service access panel is designed for easy removal and access.

risk.desc: The slip ring may not provide sufficient power and signal capacity for the end-effector.
risk.mit: Review the power and signal requirements and ensure the slip ring is rated for the necessary load.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Final roll joint of the 6-DOF serial industrial robot arm

physics_paths.description: Rotation of the wrist roll joint (J6) provides the final roll axis for tool orientation
Payload torque is transmitted through the wrist roll joint to the base of the robot arm
Heat from the robot arm links is dissipated through the wrist roll joint
Electrical signals from the servo motor pass through the wrist roll joint to the tool flange
Maintenance personnel can access the wrist roll joint for inspection and servicing

manufacturing_strategy.datum: Primary locating faces and rail guides
manufacturing_strategy.tolerance: H7/h6 fit class for mating interfaces
